summary: Tested new Shopify Storefront Cart (hosted checkout) endpoint + frontend Buy-It-Now / Cart Drawer checkout flow. 8/8 backend pytests pass, frontend flows fully verified via Playwright network interception.
action_items: Optional: The legacy /checkout and /tnv/checkout routes in App.js still import and mount CheckoutPage. Not part of this scope but CheckoutPage.jsx is dead code on the /store path. Safe to remove in a follow-up cleanup.

Note: /store/checkout is not an explicit route but is caught by /store/:storeSlug (LuxuryStorefrontWrapper homepage with storeSlug='checkout'). It does NOT mount the legacy CheckoutPage — requirement satisfied — but consider adding an explicit 404 or redirect for clarity.
critical_code_review_comments: checkout.py: CART_CREATE_MUTATION and new /shopify-cart endpoint are clean. Proper error handling (400 for empty/userErrors, 502 for upstream GraphQL errors, 500 if token missing).

CartDrawer.jsx and ProductDetailPage.jsx correctly use process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL, surface error state via data-testid='checkout-error' / 'buy-now-error', and disable buttons during request. Good.
Minor: On empty lines the backend returns 400 with 'Cart has no items' which is correct. Frontend CartDrawer has early `if (items.length === 0) return;` guard — both layers are safe.

Optional: Consider removing the legacy `/checkout`, `/tnv/checkout`, and the `CheckoutPage` import from App.js since customer checkout is now 100% Shopify-hosted. Keeping dead code increases attack surface.
test_credentials: Not needed - storefront is public, tested against live Shopify Storefront API using SHOPIFY_STOREFRONT_ACCESS_TOKEN from backend/.env
seed_data_creation: None. Carts created via Storefront API are not orders and auto-expire on Shopify side.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New hosted-checkout endpoint POST /api/checkout/shopify-cart confirmed working. Legacy Razorpay endpoints (/create-order, /verify-payment) still exist but are not called by frontend — dormant but functional. Frontend has two Shopify-cart trigger points: (1) CartDrawer 'Checkout' button (data-testid='checkout-btn'), (2) PDP 'Buy It Now' button (data-testid='buy-it-now-btn'). Both post {lines:[{variant_id, quantity}]} and redirect via window.location.href to tnvcollection.com/cart/c/... Shopify hosted checkout. Tested live against real Shopify store — redirect URL observed in Playwright: https://tnvcollection.com/cart/c/hWNBF4NasELTZcuklaFR9X1t?key=...

test_evidence.backend_pytest: 8 passed in 12.23s — test_shopify_cart_success_single_variant, test_shopify_cart_invalid_variant (Shopify returns userErrors → 400/502), test_shopify_cart_empty_lines (400 'no items'), test_shopify_cart_multiple_lines (total_quantity sums correctly), test_shopify_cart_with_buyer_email, test_products_list, test_product_detail, test_collections.
frontend_playwright: PDP /store/product/15286613770406 renders both data-testid='add-to-cart-btn' and data-testid='buy-it-now-btn'.
Add To Cart opens data-testid='cart-drawer'. Checkout btn fires POST /api/checkout/shopify-cart with body {"lines":[{"variant_id":56387172860070,"quantity":1}]} → 200.

Buy It Now on PDP fires same POST → 200 → window.location.href redirect observed to https://tnvcollection.com/cart/c/hWNBF4NasELTZcuklaFR9X1t?key=... (intercepted & aborted so we don't complete Shopify checkout).

/store/checkout URL does NOT mount legacy CheckoutPage (no Razorpay script/iframe). It is caught by /store/:storeSlug which renders LuxuryStorefrontHome — CheckoutPage.jsx is no longer reachable from /store path.

rca_of_the_issue: N/A — this was a feature-validation run, not a bug fix. All acceptance criteria from the review request are met.
